description: Take your dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and absolutely comfortable for the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperLeather uppers for comfort and durabilityComfortable slip-on design with elasticated inserts for easy insertion and removal of the feet and a snug FitLeather lining for greater comfortMidsoleCushioned foot-bed for all-day comfortBrand badge on the foot-bed for styleOutsole TPU outsole with a scooped heel, dotted pattern on the mid-foot and heel and grooves for better grip and durability
